extraction.one_line_summary: IMPEY Daryl won from reduced bunch after attack at line, beating MATTHEWS on final climb that shed pure sprinters like PASQUALON.
tactical_patterns: EF Education-EasyPost controlled breakaway margin under 1:30 throughout to ensure reduced sprint finish, not pure leadout.
Final climb steep enough to distance PASQUALON-type sprinters but WILLIAMS rejoined through clever positioning before summit.
REICHENBACH's late attack created launch platform for IMPEY's winning move, showing Israel-PremierTech coordinated 1-2 punch.

rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: 37-year-old shows climb-sprint hybrid still competitive when EF sets up selective finish
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: positive: despite being distanced on final climb, tactical positioning allowed rejoin before summit attacks
rider_signals.PASQUALON Andrea: negative: dropped on final climb that faster puncheurs handled, confirming limitation on even moderate gradients
rider_signals.REICHENBACH Sebastian: neutral: attack didn't stick but created chaos enabling IMPEY's winning move
